arts.ttl: Sam Allardyce praises Arsenal's use of 'dark arts' against Man City and recalls the time Liverpool reported him for using similar tactics with Bolton
arts.sum: Allardyce clearly approved of how Arteta's men stifled City's flow, having deployed similar tactics against some of the Premier League's biggest teams while in charge of Bolton in the 2000s.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Jose Mourinho 'more than influenced' his managerial style
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has admitted that his tactics have been "more than" influenced by former rival Jose Mourinho. While the Gunners had typically been labelled as an evangelical footballing side who are soft defensively from the second half of Arsene Wenger's reign onwards, Arteta has sought to flip that narrative and make them one of the Premier League's more aggressive teams.

arts.ttl: Premier League Clubs Contact PGMOL With Concerns Over Arsenal's "Dark Arts"
arts.sum: Arsenal are the brunt of criticism after deploying 'dark art' tactics, which has led to outrage from Premier League clubs as far back as last season.
